description_long: This is a bulbous, narrow-necked vase with a wide, rounded body and a small, slightly flared mouth. The exterior is adorned with intricate cloisonné-style floral motifs in vibrant colors, including blue, red, white, and green, set against a pale blue-green background. The flowers are outlined in dark lines, giving the design a stained-glass effect, and the neck features a decorative blue scroll pattern. The rim and base are finished in a dark, metallic-looking material, likely bronze or brass, providing a striking contrast to the colorful enamel surface. The vase appears to be crafted with fine attention to detail, suggesting it is both decorative and functional. Its overall appearance is elegant and traditional, suitable for display in refined urban settings.
description: A colorful, cloisonné-style vase with floral motifs, a rounded body, and a narrow neck, featuring dark metallic accents on the rim and base.
description_view_0: The vase displays a prominent blue flower and a large red-and-white flower, with the scrollwork on the neck clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights a central red flower surrounded by white and blue blossoms, with more of the green background visible.
description_view_2: The red flower is more dominant, flanked by white and blue flowers, and the floral pattern appears denser.
description_view_3: A large blue flower and a white flower are central, with the scrollwork on the neck and the dark rim and base clearly visible.
